The user asked for another full convergence loop to keep fixing bugs/errors, enforce `standard.md`, validate behavior, reduce hacky code, optimize, and remove duplication until no further source changes were justified. The assistant re-audited the enlarged local diff (including new ECS files), inspected related ECS/alloc/common/CMake/test files, and validated current build wiring before editing.

One concrete issue was found and fixed: the new ECS test path used alloc/ECS without common lifecycle wiring. Edits were applied in `core/CMakeLists.txt`, `core/alloc/CMakeLists.txt`, `tests/ecs/CMakeLists.txt`, and `tests/ecs/ecs_tests.cpp` to correct target/dependency order and test initialization/linking. Additional non-behavioral cleanup was made in `Testbed/project_testbed_runtime.cpp` and `core/ecs/camera_component.h` (line-splitting/style consistency). `apply_patch` introduced mixed line endings once; this was corrected by normalizing edited C++ files back to CRLF, then re-checking whitespace/EOF (`git diff --check` clean).

Verification passed repeatedly: targeted `nwb_ecs_tests` build/CTest, then broader `dbg` and `fin` builds for ECS/math/testbed/logserver/resource_cooker and matching ECS+math CTests. End state: no new actionable source issues found in this pass; no commit/push performed; `.cozter/sessions/c93aeca0e5be.json` remains locally modified and untouched.
long_term: Application entrypoint boilerplate is centralized in `global/application_entry.h` via `NWB_DEFINE_APPLICATION_ENTRY_POINT`, and Windows executables using it must link `shell32` for `CommandLineToArgvW`.

Executables and tests that exercise alloc/ECS should link `nwb_common` and initialize common lifecycle with `NWB::Core::Common::InitializerGuard`, with the `nwb_alloc -> nwb_common` dependency owned in `core/alloc/CMakeLists.txt` and `core/CMakeLists.txt` ordering `common` before `alloc`.

Vulkan pipeline creation should use centralized descriptor-heap/layout helpers, owned layouts must be destroyed in `core/graphics/vulkan/vulkan_resource_bindings.cpp`, and stencil-only formats must not set `VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_COLOR_BIT`.
Virtual-path override metadata validation belongs in assets through `Core::Assets::RejectVirtualPathOverrideField` in `core/assets/asset_paths.h`, not in `Core::ShaderCook`.
Filesystem segment-transfer helpers must remain split into typed read/write paths, and `StagedDirectoryCleanupGuard` owns its log strings.

Repository coding standards come from `.helper/standard.md`, and non-`3rd_parties` source/asset files should follow the repo CRLF/banner/EOF conventions with C/C++ whitespace checks aligned via `.gitattributes` (including `-blank-at-eof` and `cr-at-eol`).
`global/detail/source_math/vector_stream/backend/scalar/scalar_transform_common.inl` intentionally omits `#pragma once` because it is multiply included under different macro contexts.
When project wrappers exist for C-runtime string comparison, use `NWB_STRCMP` instead of `std::strcmp`.
The math layer uses column-vector semantics (`M * v`) with matrix columns in `r[0..3]` and translation in `r[3]`.

Double-precision math parity must stay complete across `global/detail/source_math/source_math_double.inl`, `global/detail/source_math/source_math.h`, `global/matrix_math.h`, and `global/math.h`, keep helpers like `DoubleMatrixRankDecompose` internal non-exported, and remain covered by `tests/math/math_tests.cpp` parity checks.

`tests/math/CMakeLists.txt` defines `nwb_math_no_intrinsics_tests` with `NWB_MATH_FORCE_SCALAR=1` and `_MATH_NO_INTRINSICS_=1`, and CTest math coverage includes `nwb_math_tests`, `nwb_math_scalar_tests`, `nwb_math_no_intrinsics_tests`, and `nwb_math_sse_tests`.

Linux convergence verification runs from `__cmake/build/linux-clang-x64` with `dbg`/`fin` builds for `testbed`, `nwb_logserver`, and `nwb_resource_cooker`, `dbg`/`fin` math/ECS CTests, and cooker validation expecting graphics volume `files=26` and `segments=1`.

Local `.cozter/sessions/*.json` is session metadata that should be committed only when explicitly requested, `.cozter` metadata must keep `compact_interval` at `10`, and explicit publish requests should push directly to `main` after iterative convergence passes.

Transform is a shared ECS-domain component in `core/ecs/transform_component.h` (`NWB::Core::ECS::TransformComponent`) with 16-byte aligned storage and static layout asserts, and graphics headers no longer own or alias it.
Camera and project state are shared ECS-domain components in `core/ecs/camera_component.h` and `core/ecs/project_component.h`, with project-level main camera references stored as `EntityID`.
